title: Outback Station Stay Booking
description: A premium vintage-Australiana multi-step booking form styled after classic 1960s outback travel posters. Editable in MegaForm Builder. Features a tall photographic side panel on the LEFT whose RIGHT edge is wavy and transparent (SVG mask), letting the warm parchment form flow through the curves. Ochre, terracotta and olive accents over cream, with a display-serif heading.

fields.label: Guest Details
fields.heading: Book your outback escape
fields.intro: Start with your details so we can prepare your welcome swag and station map.

fields.label: Your Stay
fields.heading: When are you heading bush?

fields.label: Experiences
fields.heading: Pick your adventures
fields.intro: Add the experiences you fancy. All stays include a sunset campfire and damper night.

fields.label: Confirm
fields.heading: One last yarn before you go
fields.intro: A few final details, then send it through and we'll get the billy on.

fields.label: How did you hear about the station?
How keen are you?
fields.hint: 1 = she'll be right, 5 = flat out like a lizard drinking
